name: Chocolate Chip Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream the margarine and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the water and vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk if using, until just combined.
5. Fold in the chopped apples and chocolate chips.
6. Grease a tube pan and pour in the batter.
7. Bake at 325°F for 75 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool on a rack before serving.
